category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a command-line unarchiving tool supporting multiple formats; official command-line page describes unar and lsar for macOS, Windows, and Linux.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is unar; official command-line page names the tools unar and lsar.
docs_sources: Official The Unarchiver command-line page is the best documentation surface found for unar/lsar usage and source-download notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/MacPaw/XADMaster, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify command-line archive extraction tools; official command-line page documents unar and lsar as archive tools.
